# Haps Club

> Haps Club is a hand-picked guide to what is worth doing in Los Angeles this week — events, food, and culture. It is delivered as a free weekly email every Tuesday morning and as a continuously updated homepage at https://haps.club.

Haps Club is independent and editorial: a real person reading the city, not an algorithmic listings feed. Every pick names its LA neighborhood and links straight to the source. Coverage spans the Eastside, Westside, Hollywood, West Hollywood, Mid-City, Downtown, and beyond. Founded and written by Michael Abraham.

## Key pages
- [This week in LA](https://haps.club/): The current week's hand-picked events, food, and culture, filterable by category and neighborhood.
- [Subscribe](https://haps.club/subscribe): Join the free newsletter — one email every Tuesday morning, unsubscribe anytime.
- [About](https://haps.club/about): Who runs Haps Club, the editorial philosophy, and how to submit a tip.
- [Sitemap](https://haps.club/sitemap): A full, human-readable index of pages.

## Events
- [Summer Solstice in the Garden](https://haps.club/events/summer-solstice-in-the-garden/): Saturday, June 20, 2026, 5–9 PM at Twentieth Street Garden in West Adams, Los Angeles. An open-air evening with BBQ on site and a beverage included. Tickets from $10.

## Contact
- Email: newsletter@haps.club
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/thehapsclub

## Notes
- Coverage area: Los Angeles, California, USA.
- Cadence: a weekly email on Tuesdays, plus a daily homepage refresh.
- Cost: free.
